programme.title: Blackbeard Part One
programme.desc: In 1717, Royal Navy Lieutenant Robert Maynard is sent to the West Indies on a secret mission to destroy notorious pirate ship The Queen Anne's Revenge and its crew.

programme.title: Blackbeard Part Two
programme.desc: In 1717, Royal Navy Lieutenant Robert Maynard is sent to the West Indies on a secret mission to destroy notorious pirate ship The Queen Anne's Revenge and its crew.

programme.title: Here Kills the Bride
programme.desc: Carlos' sister finds out that he is getting married in a week to Grace, a girl he just met in a strip club. His sister investigates and gets pulled into a whirlwind of events, putting her own life at risk.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants nothing more than to rebuild her estranged relationship with her mother and little sister, who are shut-ins due to her sister's illness. But when Riley realizes her sister may not actually be as sick as she appears, Riley's mother catches on, stopping at nothing to keep her daughters with her forever.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: In this tongue-in-cheek sequel, the benevolent bog creature falls for the vegetarian, plant-loving daughter of the evil scientist who created him.

programme.title: Prisoners of the Lost Universe
programme.desc: Three people are transported into a parallel reality, where they find they must use modern technology, but medieval weapons, in order to save the citizenry from a murderous warlord.

programme.title: Howl
programme.desc: A late-night train ride leaving London quickly becomes a scary nightmare when the train stops unexpectedly. The driver steps out to check but doesn't come back. Now, the young guard and a group of passengers are left alone, facing a tough battle for survival against a group of evil and frightening creatures.

programme.title: Zulu Dawn
programme.desc: In 1879 South Africa, British Cape Colony administrators seek to crush the Zulus, viewing them as an obstacle to their colonial ambitions. To provoke war, they issue King Cetshwayo an impossible ultimatum, confident their rifles and artillery will ensure an easy victory. But as Lord Chelmsford’s forces chase an unseen foe, they discover near Isandlwana how gravely they’ve underestimated the Zulu nation’s skill and strength.

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: When the telegraph made its debut, Pony Express riders like John Blair and his buddy Smoky lost their jobs. The government mail contract is up for grabs, and a race will determine if they or Drake, the owner of the Stageline, will win it. AKA Stagecoach Run

programme.title: Luna: Spirit of the Whale
programme.desc: When a single Orca is seen near Vancouver Island, it’s clear it got separated from its pod and is in the wrong spot. Ted Jeffries and his team at the Department of Fisheries & Oceans (DFO) want to catch Luna and bring him back to his family. But, the local folks think it should be up to Luna to decide where to stay.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E.
programme.desc: After losing her parents in a car accident, 15-year-old Isabel Sullivan moves to a small town to live with her Uncle Paul. She makes friends with a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. He looks like a regular dog but he can talk, run super fast, has x-ray vision, and is really strong. They become close friends, but then a bad guy shows up in town saying he owns A.R.C.H.I.E.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E. 2 : Mission Impawsible
programme.desc: In this sequel, the super intelligent artificial robotronic dog, Archie, befriends Gregory, a young boy who is the son of a carnival owner. Gregory is concerned that someone has been stealing from the carnival and enlists his new friend to help find the culprit.

programme.title: Somewhere in Time
programme.desc: A Chicago playwright uses self-hypnosis to journey back in time and meet the actress whose old portrait hangs in an elegant hotel.
